Table 6 - Aboveground Storage of Explosive Artiles - Rules for Miving of Conpatibility
Articles may be mixed in abovegroumd storage as shown in the following table:
Compatibility Group B fizes may be stored with the articles to which they wil be assembled,
but the NEQ must be aggregated and treated ss Compatibility Group F.
Storage in the same building is permitted if effectively segregated to prevent propagation.
Compatbility Group L articles must always be stored separately from all articles of other
compatibility groups as well as from all other articles of different types of Compatibility
Mixing of articles of Compatibility Group G with articles of other compatibility groups is at
tbe discretion of the National Competent Authority.
